title: zerna
intro: Zerna, also known as Silybum marianum, is a flowering plant in the thistle family native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating liver and gallbladder issues due to its silymarin content, which acts as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of zerna include improved liver function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced antioxidant defenses, making it a popular herbal remedy for conditions such as cirrhosis, jaundice, and hepatitis. Zerna is often prepared as a supplement in capsule or tablet form, and can also be found in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures.
